title: Minecraft: Sticks n' Stones
description: A vanilla-plus modpack, bringing the best of Minecraft's history together with a bit of spice!
body:
[![mod pack title](https://mc-sns.github.io/res/modpack_title.png)](https://mc-sns.github.io/)

----

[![built on adrenaline](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/adrenaline_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) [![link to the mod pack's website](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/website_64h.png)](https://mc-sns.github.io/)

[![kofi donation link](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kckarnige) [![buy me a coffee donation link](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/buymeacoffee-singular_64h.png)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)

(Pre 2.0 versions included a [Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#FzZIiJ))

A modpack focused on what I think Minecraft should be, all of the best parts of Minecraft through-out it's history put together in one modpack, the sticks n' stones, the bread n' butter, the chicken n' waffles, whatever perfect combo you can think of, this is my take on that for Minecraft, with a few personal touches.

The world gen of beta Minecraft, thanks to [Hybrid Beta: Cascades](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hybrid-beta), slightly more indepth progression thanks to [my tool touch-ups mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltouchups) and the [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) enchant overhaul that makes enchants less RNG based, nicer visuals thanks to mods like [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular), [Effectual](https://modrinth.com/mod/effectual), and [jbritain's "Visual Vibrance" shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/visual-vibrance) (disabled by default), and a few classic quality of life mods like [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) and my own take on turning rotten flesh into leather, [the "Undead Leather" mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/undead-leather).

There are still things to do, so stick around and stay tuned!

# Q&A 

### Q: Can I make a derivitive modpack?
A: Go ahead, just make sure to link back to this Modrinth page!

### Q: Can I redistrubute this?
A: Unless you're in a third-world country, no.

### Q: There's a bug, how can I report it?
A: Submit an issue on GitHub! [Click here to do that](https://github.com/mc-sns/mc-sns.github.io/labels), or check the "links" tab on Modrinth.
